text: The Grafana-to-Loki HTTP call chain: Step 1 — grafana/grafana pkg/tsdb/loki/api.go defines the LokiAPI struct, which is the HTTP client that sends log queries from Grafana to the Loki backend. Step 2 — sg-evals/grafana-loki pkg/loghttp/query.go defines ParseInstantQuery, the function that parses incoming HTTP instant query requests on the Loki side.
